category_sources: Official SCons GitHub README describes SCons as a software construction tool: https://github.com/SCons/scons
source_facts.description says SCons is a substitute for make with autoconf/automake functionality.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is scons; official homepage uses SCons branding: https://www.scons.org/
docs_sources: Official SCons documentation page links current man pages and user guides: https://scons.org/category/documentation.html
repo_sources: GitHub repository title is SCons/scons: https://github.com/SCons/scons
Official SCons development page says the code repository is hosted on GitHub: https://scons.org/dev.html
tags_sources: Official GitHub README covers command-line installation and Python-based SCons usage: https://github.com/SCons/scons
